package rulecoverage

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Positive scenario for commit_or_rollback_split_across_functions_without_owner.
// Rule intent: Transaction end-state logic spread across helper functions with unclear ownership.
type SplitTxModel struct {
	ID     string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
}

func commitTx(tx *gorm.DB) {
	tx.Commit()
}

func rollbackTx(tx *gorm.DB) {
	tx.Rollback()
}

func PositiveCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwner(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB, input string) error {
	tx := db.Begin()
	tx.Create(&SplitTxModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"})

	if input == "" {
		rollbackTx(tx)
		return nil
	}

	commitTx(tx)
	return nil
}
